data.title: Implement auth-file allowlist in worktree-isolation-guard.sh
data.description:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/hooks/worktree-isolation-guard.sh from categorical deny to auth-file allowlist for isolation:worktree Agent dispatches.

### Implementation:
1. After detecting isolation=worktree, BEFORE denying, check for auth marker files:
   - Glob for /tmp/worktree-isolation-authorized-*
   - For each match: read PID from file content, verify PID is alive via kill -0 $PID
   - If any valid (alive PID) marker exists → exit 0 (allow, no deny output)
   - If no valid marker → output permissionDecision:deny (existing behavior)
2. Stale marker cleanup: remove any marker files whose PID is dead (kill -0 fails)
3. Preserve existing behavior: non-Agent tools exit 0, Agent without isolation exits 0

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/hooks/worktree-isolation-guard.sh (EDIT — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)

### TDD Requirement
RED tests from Task 87d1-37e8 must turn GREEN after this implementation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/hooks/test-worktree-isolation-guard.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-worktree-isolation-guard.sh
- [ ] Agent with isolation:worktree AND valid auth marker is allowed (no deny)
  Verify: echo '{"tool_name":"Agent","tool_input":{"isolation":"worktree"}}' | MARKER=$(mktemp /tmp/worktree-isolation-authorized-XXXXXX) && echo $$ > "$MARKER" && bash plugins/dso/hooks/worktree-isolation-guard.sh | grep -v 'deny' && rm -f "$MARKER"
- [ ] Agent with isolation:worktree WITHOUT auth marker is denied
  Verify: rm -f /tmp/worktree-isolation-authorized-* && echo '{"tool_name":"Agent","tool_input":{"isolation":"worktree"}}' | bash plugins/dso/hooks/worktree-isolation-guard.sh | grep -q 'deny'
